import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react"; import { useSelector } from "react-redux"; export default function Index() { const { count } = useSelector((state) => state.visitor); const heroRef = useRef(null); const [isVisible, setIsVisible] = useState(false); // useRef + useEffect로 애니메이션 트리거 useEffect(() => { setIsVisible(true); }, []); // Typing effect with useRef const textRef = useRef(null); const [displayText, setDisplayText] = useState(''); const fullText = '데이터로 문제를 해결하는'; useEffect(() => { let index = 0; const timer = setInterval(() => { if (index <= fullText.length) { setDisplayText(fullText.slice(0, index)); index++; } else { clearInterval(timer); } }, 100); return () => clearInterval(timer); }, []); return (
